parameters.query: SELECT p.id, p.content_text, p.media_urls, p.format_metadata, c.platform, c.access_token, c.account_id, c.account_type FROM posts p JOIN channels c ON p.channel_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 'scheduled' AND p.scheduled_at <= NOW() AND c.platform = 'linkedin' ORDER BY p.scheduled_at ASC LIMIT 50;
UPDATE posts SET status = 'published', published_at = NOW(), external_post_id = $1 WHERE id = $2;
INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, resource_id, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at) VALUES ('post_publish', 'post', $1, 'n8n', 'system', 'success', $2, NOW());

UPDATE posts SET status = 'failed', published_at = NULL WHERE id = $1;
INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, resource_id, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at) VALUES ('post_publish', 'post', $1, 'n8n', 'system', 'error', $2, NOW());
